# services.gitlab-runner

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.gitlab-runner`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| ------------------------------------------------ | ------------------------------ | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `services.gitlab-runner.checkInterval` | `signed integer` | Defines the interval length, in seconds, between new jobs check. The default value is 3; if set to 0 or lower, the default value will be used. See runner documentation for more information. |
| `services.gitlab-runner.concurrent` | `signed integer` | Limits how many jobs globally can be run concurrently. The most upper limit of jobs using all defined runners. 0 does not mean unlimited. |
| `services.gitlab-runner.configFile` | `null or absolute path` | Configuration file for gitlab-runner. |
| `services.gitlab-runner.configOptions` | | |
| `services.gitlab-runner.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Gitlab Runner. |
| `services.gitlab-runner.extraPackages` | `list of package` | Extra packages to add to PATH for the gitlab-runner process. |
| `services.gitlab-runner.gracefulTermination` | `boolean` | Finish all remaining jobs before stopping. If not set gitlab-runner will stop immediatly without waiting for jobs to finish, which will lead to failed builds. |
| `services.gitlab-runner.gracefulTimeout` | `string` | Time to wait until a graceful shutdown is turned into a forceful one. |
| `services.gitlab-runner.package` | `package` | Gitlab Runner package to use. |
| `services.gitlab-runner.packages` | | |
| `services.gitlab-runner.prometheusListenAddress` | `null or string` | Address (<host>:<port>) on which the Prometheus metrics HTTP server should be listening. |
| `services.gitlab-runner.sentryDSN` | `null or string` | Data Source Name for tracking of all system level errors to Sentry. |
| `services.gitlab-runner.services` | `attribute set of (submodule)` | GitLab Runner services. |
| `services.gitlab-runner.sessionServer` | `submodule` | The session server allows the user to interact with jobs that the Runner is responsible for. A good example of this is the interactive web terminal . |
| `services.gitlab-runner.workDir` | | |
